ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was uploaded */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the dataset is stored */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the dataset */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the dataset */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* User who last modified the dataset */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the dataset was last modified */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the dataset (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., Linear Regression, Decision Tree) */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model post-training */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used for training the model */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who trained the model */,
  "training_duration" REAL /* Duration of the training process */,
  "validation_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the validation set */,
  "test_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the model on the test set */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the model (e.g., trained, deployed, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being experimented on */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the model during the experiment */,
  "result" REAL /* Result of the experiment (e.g., accuracy, loss) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the experiment was run */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who ran the experiment */,
  "experiment_duration" REAL /* Duration of the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model used for prediction */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Input data for the prediction */,
  "predicted_output" TEXT /* Predicted output based on the model */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who made the prediction */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the prediction (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model version */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated model */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the model version was created/updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in this version */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who created the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, archived, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., API, database, file) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "connection_details" TEXT /* Connection details (e.g., API endpoint, database connection string) */,
  "last_synced" TEXT /* Last date and time the data was synchronized */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the related model */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., F1 Score, ROC AUC) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the metric was recorded */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who recorded the metric */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., classification, regression) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predicted_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome entry */,
  "input_data" TEXT /* Input data used for the prediction */,
  "actual_output" TEXT /* Actual outcome observed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the outcome was observed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who observed the outcome */,
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the corresponding prediction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the outcome (e.g., verified, unverified) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predicted_outcomes_prediction_id FOREIGN KEY ("prediction_id") REFERENCES predictions ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predicted_outcomes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
